   "reasoning": "Budget injections can be misallocated, but these schools desperately need some help. Given the compliance risks associated with bonuses, I've recommended a full-intensity incentive program to try and stem the teacher exodus, but I've also prioritized more concrete, audit-friendly interventions like attendance mandates and transparency reporting. Let's avoid adding any more free-form programs that might not hold up under scrutiny.",
